ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Setup.Kingsbridge_General_Custom_Setting__c.Validation_Rule__c = False, $User.Alias <> 'IntUser', $User.Alias <> 'guest', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Partner_Opportunity', ISCHANGED(StageName), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Won'), ISNULL( Agreement_End_Date_IR35__c ), INCLUDES( Product_Type__c, 'IR35 Tool') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: OV4: Agreement End Date for IR35 Tool is required
